testcase.name: Comment Flow › TC-INTERACT-COMMENT-01: comment section opens after clicking comment button
Comment Flow › TC-INTERACT-COMMENT-02: comment input field is visible and editable
Comment Flow › TC-INTERACT-COMMENT-03: typing in comment input reflects the text
Comment Flow › TC-INTERACT-COMMENT-04: comment submit button enables when text is entered
Comment Flow › TC-INTERACT-COMMENT-05: submitting a comment clears the input
Comment Flow › TC-INTERACT-COMMENT-06: submitted comment appears in the comment thread
Comment Flow › TC-INTERACT-COMMENT-07: existing comments are visible in the comment section
Comment Flow › TC-INTERACT-COMMENT-08: comment section shows comment count
Comment Flow › TC-INTERACT-COMMENT-09: reply button is present on individual comments
Comment Flow › TC-INTERACT-COMMENT-10: clicking Reply on a comment opens a reply input
Comment Flow › TC-INTERACT-COMMENT-11: own comment has a delete option
Comment Flow › TC-INTERACT-COMMENT-12: click like on comment, verify like state toggled (aria-pressed changed, count changed, or class changed)
Reaction Picker › TC-INTERACT-REACT-01: hovering the like button reveals a reaction picker
Reaction Picker › TC-INTERACT-REACT-02: reaction picker contains multiple distinct reaction options
Reaction Picker › TC-INTERACT-REACT-03: clicking a reaction registers it and updates button state
Reaction Picker › TC-INTERACT-REACT-04: click reaction count, verify a reactions list/modal opens showing who reacted
Reaction Picker › TC-INTERACT-REACT-05: clicking reaction count opens the reactions list viewer
Reaction Picker › TC-INTERACT-REACT-06: clicking the active reaction again removes it (toggle)
Post Detail View › TC-INTERACT-DETAIL-01: clicking on post content navigates to post detail page
Post Detail View › TC-INTERACT-DETAIL-02: post detail page shows the post content
Post Detail View › TC-INTERACT-DETAIL-03: post detail page has a comment section
Post Detail View › TC-INTERACT-DETAIL-04: post detail page shows like and share buttons
Post Detail View › TC-INTERACT-DETAIL-05: post detail shows the author's name and avatar
Post Detail View › TC-INTERACT-DETAIL-06: back navigation from detail returns to home feed
Post Detail View › TC-INTERACT-DETAIL-07: post timestamp is shown on the detail page
Share Flow › TC-INTERACT-SHARE-01: click share button, verify share dialog/sheet/menu opens (contains share options)
Share Flow › TC-INTERACT-SHARE-02: clicking share opens a share options panel or dialog
Share Flow › TC-INTERACT-SHARE-03: share panel contains a copy link option
Share Flow › TC-INTERACT-SHARE-04: share panel has a repost or share to feed option
Share Flow › TC-INTERACT-SHARE-05: share panel can be dismissed with Escape
Share Flow › TC-INTERACT-SHARE-06: share panel has a send via message option

See More — Long Post Truncation › TC-INTERACT-SEERMORE-01: click See More, verify text expanded (element height increased or truncation removed — check that a "See Less" button appears or text length increased)
See More — Long Post Truncation › TC-INTERACT-SEERMORE-02: clicking "See more" expands the full post text
See More — Long Post Truncation › TC-INTERACT-SEERMORE-03: expanded post shows a "See less" button
See More — Long Post Truncation › TC-INTERACT-SEERMORE-04: clicking "See less" re-truncates the post
Bookmark / Save Post › TC-INTERACT-SAVE-01: click save/bookmark button, verify state changed (aria-pressed, icon class, or toast appeared)
Bookmark / Save Post › TC-INTERACT-SAVE-02: clicking bookmark saves the post and updates button state
Bookmark / Save Post › TC-INTERACT-SAVE-03: bookmark button in post 3-dot menu is accessible
Bookmark / Save Post › TC-INTERACT-SAVE-04: saved posts are accessible from profile or saved section
Feed Tabs › TC-INTERACT-TABS-01: feed tabs are visible if present (For You / Following / Latest)
Feed Tabs › TC-INTERACT-TABS-02: active tab is visually distinguished
Feed Tabs › TC-INTERACT-TABS-03: clicking an inactive tab switches feed content
Feed Tabs › TC-INTERACT-TABS-04: switching tabs does not break the page or throw errors
Hashtags and Mentions › TC-INTERACT-TAG-01: hashtags in posts are rendered as clickable links
Hashtags and Mentions › TC-INTERACT-TAG-02: clicking a hashtag navigates to the hashtag or explore page
Hashtags and Mentions › TC-INTERACT-TAG-03: @mentions in posts are rendered as clickable profile links
Hashtags and Mentions › TC-INTERACT-TAG-04: clicking an @mention navigates to that user's profile
Infinite Scroll and Loading State › TC-INTERACT-SCROLL-01: scrolling to bottom triggers a loading indicator
Infinite Scroll and Loading State › TC-INTERACT-SCROLL-02: more posts load after scrolling to bottom
Infinite Scroll and Loading State › TC-INTERACT-SCROLL-03: page does not crash during repeated scrolling
Infinite Scroll and Loading State › TC-INTERACT-SCROLL-04: back-to-top button appears after scrolling down
Infinite Scroll and Loading State › TC-INTERACT-SCROLL-05: feed items are not duplicated after pagination
